query: SELECT forestryMulchingBaseRate, landClearingBaseRate, brushHoggingBaseRate, rowClearingBaseRate, mobilizationFee, minimumJobTotal, densityModerateMultiplier, densityHeavyMultiplier, terrainRollingMultiplier, terrainSteepMultiplier, accessModerateMultiplier, accessDifficultMultiplier, priceRangeSpread, westTnMobilizationFee, stumpGrindingPerStump, debrisHaulingPerLoad, volumeDiscount3to5Pct, volumeDiscount5to10Pct, volumeDiscount10plusPct FROM ai_pricing_settings LIMIT 1;
